description: Developed scalable web applications using Python and Django following best coding practices. Implemented MVT architecture and designed RESTful APIs for enterprise-level products.
bullets: Developed scalable web applications using Python and Django following best coding practices.
Implemented Model View Template (MVT) architecture to ensure modular, maintainable codebases.
Designed and developed RESTful APIs to support web and mobile application integrations.
Utilized Django ORM for efficient database interactions and clean data modeling.
Enhanced frontend responsiveness using AJAX, reducing page load times and improving user experience.
Optimized MySQL queries to improve performance and handle large-scale datasets.
Collaborated with UI/UX designers and frontend developers to deliver seamless user experiences.
Managed source code using Git, supporting version control and collaborative development.
Contributed to enterprise software products including AMSTIN and Mobpro.
